Mechanism of Jianpixiaoke Recipe in Treating Type 2 Diabetes Based on Network Pharmacology and Molecular Docking

evidence_entities.text: This study screened a total of 366 targets for the JPXK recipe, 1886 T2DM‐related targets, and 214 intersecting targets. The active ingredients of the JPXK recipe were quercetin, isorhamnetin, luteolin, berberine, kaempferol, etc.
Potential hub targets were ESR1, JUN, SRC, PIK3R1, FOS, MAPK1, AKT1, RELA, and MAPK3.
The main pathways of the JPXK recipe in treating T2DM included the MAPK signaling pathway, cAMP signaling pathway, tumor necrosis factor signaling pathway, Toll‐like receptor signaling pathway, etc.
Animal experiments verified that the JPXK recipe had a good hypoglycemic effect.
